title: selaginella moraniana
intro: Selaginella moraniana, also known as the spiny spike moss or Moran's spike moss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella moraniana include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selaginella moraniana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
